'''Charger''' was a [[Captain/Legends|captain]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] who served on the [[Independence/Legends|''Independence'']] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="XWOSG" />

In [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], Charger was a senior officer aboard the [[MC80A Home One Type Heavy Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 ''Home One'' type Star Cruiser]] ''Independence'', and was present for the briefing prior to [[Battle in the Turkana system|mission]] to capture information from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|Corellian Corvette]] [[Talon (Imperial corvette)|''Talon'']], asking [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]] what should be done with the corvette after its capture.<ref name="XWOSG" />
